title: Hornet Removal in Scarsdale, NY | $350-$550 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Scarsdale, Westchester. Safe elimination of hornet nests from $350-$550. Licensed experts serving all Scarsdale neighborhoods. Call today!
intro: Hornets pose a serious threat to Scarsdale residents and their beautiful properties, building aggressive nests in eaves, trees, and attics throughout this prestigious Westchester village. Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, safe hornet removal services specifically designed for Scarsdale's unique mix of historic estates and family homes. Our experienced technicians eliminate hornet nests completely while protecting your property and loved ones.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Scarsdale and Westchester County for years with licensed, insured professionals who understand the specific pest challenges facing this area. We offer same-day emergency service, use eco-friendly methods safe for children and pets, and provide warranties on all hornet removal work.
localContext: Scarsdale's tree-lined streets, large properties near Fox Meadow and Heathcote, and historic homes create ideal conditions for hornets to establish nests in sheltered locations. From the Bronx River Parkway corridor to properties near Scarsdale Golf Club, our team knows the local terrain and responds quickly to hornet infestations throughout the village.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal in Scarsdale typically costs between $350 and $550, depending on the size and location of the nest, accessibility, and the severity of the infestation. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Scarsdale?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency hornet removal service in Scarsdale and throughout Westchester County. Most hornet nest removals are completed within 1-2 hours, and we can typically arrive at your Scarsdale property within a few hours of your call during peak season.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal methods prioritize safety for your family and pets. We use targeted treatments and professional-grade protective equipment, and we'll provide specific instructions for keeping children and pets at a safe distance during and immediately after the removal process.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than yellow jackets and most wasps, typically building large paper nests in trees or under eaves. They are more aggressive when defending their nests and can sting multiple times. Our Scarsdale technicians are trained to identify and safely remove all stinging insect nests, regardless of species.
